Question Title

Question Title

* 14. Are you comfortable working a rotating roster that will include weekend and public holiday work?

Question Title

* 15. Do you have any holidays of 4 or more days planned within the next 6 Months?

Question Title

* 16. How engaged in the surf culture are you?

Question Title

* 18. How engaged in streetwear fashion are you?

Question Title

Question Title

* 20. Overall if asked about skate products what could you tell us?

Question Title

* 21. How often do you use social media?

Question Title

Question Title

Question Title

* 25. Do you have your own vehicle to be able to get to work?

Question Title

* 26. What is your expected hourly rate range?

Question Title

* 27. Declaration: I confirm that the above information is complete and correct and that any false or misleading information will give my employer the right to terminate my employment without notice.

Thank you very much for your time. DON'T FORGET TO CLICK FORWARD TO 'DONE'

Your response has been emailed to us for review. If we take this further we will email you an official application form to be completed.

A CV will help your application - please email joinus@undergroundskate.co.nz
